title: eriogonum umbellatum subsp. bahiiforme
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum subsp. bahiiforme, also known as sulphur buckwheat, is a subspecies of the buckwheat sage plant, native to western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum umbellatum subsp. bahiiforme include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in treating various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
